description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure depicted in a casual urban outfit. The person is wearing a hooded jacket layered over a graphic t-shirt, paired with fitted jeans and sneakers. The figure's arms are extended outward horizontally, and the head is upright, showing a confident and relaxed demeanor. The hairstyle is short on the sides with more volume on top, styled upward. The clothing appears to be comfortable and suitable for everyday city environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average and proportional.
description: A casually dressed adult standing with arms outstretched, wearing a hooded jacket, t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, with a short, voluminous hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded jacket, graphic t-shirt, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, jacket, and the figure's upright posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hooded jacket, jeans, and the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the jacket, jeans, and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded jacket over a graphic t-shirt and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with volume on top, styled upward
